failures.query: BBB CoreCap tubeless valve site:wiggle.com OR site:chainreactioncycles.com
Schwalbe Clik valve inner tube site:bike24.de
BBB CoreCap tubeless valve price EUR buy
Schwalbe Clik valve price EUR buy
LME aluminum price USD per ton today
US Midwest aluminum premium USD per pound today 2026

10.evidenceText: No price information found in any of the three sources provided (bike-discount.de, bike24.com, or schwalbe.com).
10.extractionRationale: All three sources describe Schwalbe Clik Valve products and features but none contain explicit retail pricing data. The content from bike24.com lists product names and images but no prices are included in the excerpt. The other sources are product information pages without pricing.

27.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 Tubeless Ventil - schwarz | 80 mm | 2 Stück | BIKE24
27.evidenceText: Four distinct CoreCap AL Valve BTI-166 product URLs identified: p1993548.html (80mm schwarz), p1993546.html (40mm schwarz), p1993547.html (60mm schwarz), p1993550.html (60mm Kupfer). Source 5 is a valve core accessory, not a CoreCap valve listing.
27.extractionRationale: Counted all unique product page URLs for CoreCap valves on bike24.de DE market. Four distinct product listings with different variants (sizes and colors) were identified. Excluded the valve core accessory (p1942018.html) as it is not a CoreCap valve product itself.

30.sourceTitle: BBB Cycling CoreCap BTI-165 Valve Core - copper | 2 Pieces | BIKE24
30.evidenceText: Product descriptions provided do not contain any stock status information such as 'out of stock', 'currently unavailable', 'nicht verfügbar', or 'ausverkauft'
30.extractionRationale: The three product listings (copper, black 80mm, and red variants) contain only product descriptions and features. No stock availability information is visible in the provided text excerpts. Stock status cannot be determined from the available evidence.

56.evidenceText: Identified distinct Schwalbe inner tube models with Clik Valve interface: No. 17, No. 19, Nr. 15, Nr. 15L-EL, Nr. 6, Nr. 3, No. 14, No. 19L-EL, No. 19-EL, and Nr. 12 across multiple BIKE24 product pages.
56.extractionRationale: Counted all distinct inner tube model/SKU variants with Clik Valve (SCV) designation from the evidence. Excluded conversion kits (Umrüstkit). Each numbered model represents a distinct tube size or model as required.

61.sourceTitle: LME Aluminium Alloy | London Metal Exchange
61.extractionRationale: Extracted from LME Aluminium Alloy closing price of 3450.00. Note: This is the alloy contract price, not the primary aluminum spot price. The second source provides premium data (2589.00), not a spot price. Standard LME aluminum contract would be the preferred source but was not provided in the evidence.
